notes: This is the narrow structured-consumer successor to the validated row-fallback baseline.
The point of this case is not new playback coverage; it is to prove music.search.results -> selected_candidate_ref -> music.result.play as one product-facing chain.
Keep it candidate until hands-off replay confirms the full producer-to-consumer chain on the live desktop.
This inherits the current Chinese row-order boundary from play_visible_row.v0.
It does not claim semantic selection of 晴天; it only claims that the selected visible row should survive as a structured CandidateRef into the consumer step.
Keep it candidate until the structured chain is replayed hands-off.
